hero.description: I help founders, agencies, and small teams turn their ideas into fast, reliable Next.js sites that look great and feel even better to use.

projects.description: A collection of digital banking and business ecosystem projects developed professionally for BCA through IT vendor Doubler.

items.title: BCA - Promo
items.description: A dynamic promotional website developed through Doubler for BCA, showcasing current offers and services with a focus on user engagement and conversion.

items.title: BCA - Ocean
items.description: A digital ecosystem developed through Doubler to connect businesses with BCA's banking, operational, and industry network.

items.title: BCA - Piala Presiden
items.description: A premier esports tournament website in Indonesia developed through Doubler for BCA, showcasing top-tier competitive gaming talent.

items.title: BCA - Simulasi Obligasi
items.description: An interactive bond return simulator developed through Doubler for BCA's primary market, allowing users to calculate investment returns efficiently.

items.title: BCA - Bangga Lokal
items.description: BCA's support program for MSMEs developed through Doubler, focusing on business development, promotion, and transaction ease.

technology.title: Tools that keep your next launch smooth
technology.subtitle: You don’t need to learn the stack—just know that every choice here keeps your site fast, secure, and easy to update. These are the ingredients I rely on to ship dependable results.
